## 📋 Pull Request Description

### 🔖 Type of PR

- [ ] 🐛 Bug fix
- [ ] ✨ Feature
- [ ] 📝 Documentation
- [ ] ♻️ Refactor
- [ ] 🎨 Style/UI improvement
- [ ] ⚡ Performance improvement
- [ ] ✅ Test
- [ ] 🔧 Configuration

### 📝 Summary

A clear and concise description of what this PR does.

### 🎯 Related Issue

Fixes #(issue_number)
Related to #(issue_number)

### 🔧 Changes Made

List the specific changes made in this PR:

- **Backend**:
  - Modified: (list files)
  - Added: (list files)
  - Removed: (list files)

- **Frontend**:
  - Modified: (list files)
  - Added: (list files)
  - Removed: (list files)

- **Documentation**:
  - Modified: (list files)
  - Added: (list files)

### 🧪 Testing

Describe the tests you ran and their results:

- [ ] Unit tests pass
- [ ] Integration tests pass
- [ ] Manual testing completed
- [ ] Added new tests (if applicable)

**Test Scenarios**:
1. Test scenario 1: ✅ / ❌
2. Test scenario 2: ✅ / ❌
3. Test scenario 3: ✅ / ❌

### 📸 Screenshots

If applicable, add screenshots to demonstrate your changes:

**Before**:
![Before](screenshots/before.png)

**After**:
![After](screenshots/after.png)

### 📊 DXF Files Tested

List any DXF files tested with this change:

- [ ] `simple-warehouse.dxf` - ✅ Working
- [ ] `complex-factory-warehouse.dxf` - ✅ Working
- [ ] Custom file: (name) - ✅ / ❌

### 🔍 Breaking Changes

Are there any breaking changes in this PR?

- [ ] Yes (describe below)
- [ ] No

**Description of Breaking Changes**:
(If yes, describe what users need to do to adapt)

### 📚 Documentation

- [ ] Code is well-commented
- [ ] Updated relevant documentation
- [ ] Added/updated API documentation
- [ ] Updated README if needed

### ✅ Checklist

- [ ] My code follows the project's code style
- [ ] I have performed a self-review of my code
- [ ] I have commented my code, particularly in hard-to-understand areas
- [ ] I have made corresponding changes to the documentation
- [ ] My changes generate no new warnings
- [ ] I have tested my changes locally
- [ ] I have added tests that prove my fix is effective or that my feature works
- [ ] New and existing unit tests pass locally
- [ ] Any dependent changes have been merged and published

Any special instructions for deployment?

(If this PR requires special deployment steps, describe them here)

Any additional comments or context for reviewers?
